{{Infobox location
| name = Ghostwater facility
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is the key to the [[Ghostwater facility]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Ghostwater facility]] is a cave with an oracle tree.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] found good fortune inside the [[Ghostwater facility]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] entered the [[Ghostwater facility]] as part of tournament preparation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
